description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a collapsible stock, making it suitable for urban operations. The handguard is equipped with a rail system for mounting accessories, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for improved handling. A detachable box magazine is inserted into the magwell, and the rifle is fitted with standard iron sights along the top rail. The barrel is of standard length and appears to be free-floating, with a flash hider attached at the muzzle. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, providing both durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, rail system, detachable magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, rail system, and detachable magazine clearly.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel profile and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the magazine, stock, and handguard details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock and the slim profile of the rifle.
